title: Invalid Compact JWS error with Auth0 integration
symptom: When attempting to authenticate using Auth0, the error 'InvalidTokenError: Invalid Compact JWS' is displayed. The token also shows as having no payload when checked.
not_this_if: Token is valid and has a payload
root_cause: The error occurs because the access token provided by WeWeb is an opaque token rather than a JWT. This means it cannot be decoded or validated using standard JWT tools, leading to the 'invalid signature' error when checked against JWT validation services.
fix_steps: Refer to the Auth0 documentation for Single-Page Applications (SPA) with API.
Ensure that the correct flow (OIDC and OAuth 2.0 Implicit Grant Flow) is implemented for your application.
Use the appropriate access token format as specified in the documentation.
agent_instruction: Follow the Auth0 SPA documentation to correctly implement authentication with the API.
